raises.purpose: Fund HFC-32 refrigerant gas plant, downstream fluorochemical capacity expansion, backward integration (HF/sulphuric acid), general corporate purposes
raises.source: BSE announcement / company press release, 25 Jun 2026
raises.note: Company's first equity capital raise in over three decades; issue price was a 5% discount to the SEBI floor price of Rs 2,090.34
raises.investors: Motilal Oswal Mutual Fund, Motilal Oswal India Excellence Fund, Bengal Finance & Investment Pvt Ltd, Turn Around Opportunities Fund, Niveshaay Hedgehogs Fund

raises.purpose: Part of the ~Rs 400cr capex funding plan (balance Rs 100cr promoter preferential + Rs 300cr QIP/term debt) flagged on the Q4 FY26 concall
raises.source: BSE board-meeting outcome, 6 Jul 2026; press reports on reduced issue size
raises.note: Originally announced as Rs 173.48cr (7.41 lakh shares); reduced 42.7% to Rs 99.41cr. Shareholder approval pending at EGM scheduled 30 Jul 2026 — not yet allotted as of this report. Per-allottee split at the reduced size not confirmed in sources reviewed.
raises.investors: Anupam Rasayan India Ltd (promoter, lead subscriber), Alrox Enterprises Pvt Ltd, Vivek Jain, Tatvam Trade
